project.projectName: Amazon Rainforest Conservation and Reforestation Project
project.projectSector: Agriculture, Forestry and Other Land Use (AFOLU)

coBenefits.description: Direct carbon sequestration through reforestation of degraded pastureland
Restoration of native species habitat in the Amazon biome, supporting biodiversity corridors
Employment of 120 local community members in nursery operations and forest monitoring

design.baselineScenario: Continued cattle ranching on degraded pastureland with progressive soil erosion
design.additionality: Investment barrier — reforestation costs exceed ranching income without carbon credit revenue
design.leakageAssessment: Activity-shifting leakage assessed at 10% discount; market leakage not applicable per VM0015

article6Authorization.notes: Brazil has not yet authorized Article 6.2 transfers for VCS AFOLU projects
